finding_results.notes: Reworked four flagged capstone beats to land on body, object, or social-behavior detail; retained only the late-scene line at 431 in the negation-then-redefinition shape as the single deliberate instance.
finding_results.summary: The repeated negation-and-correction cadence was reduced by replacing most targeted abstract summations with concrete physical and social consequences while preserving one strongest rhetorical turn near the end of the chapter.
